Container.Name: matrix-hello
Container.Overview: Matrix-themed interactive web visualization with CRT TV aesthetic. Vanilla JS + Three.js + CSS served via nginx. No volumes or configuration needed — everything is baked into the image. CI/CD pushes new images to GHCR on every commit to main.
Container.Description: Matrix-themed interactive web visualization with CRT TV aesthetic. Runs as non-root nginx on port 8080. No volumes or env vars required.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: nginx web server port — map to any host port you like
